memoryPolicy: Keep .codex/memory compact. Store detailed activity in audit JSONL, checkpoints, reports, and generated dashboards.

utilities.name: validate-codex-system.ps1
utilities.purpose: Validate core .codex structure, queues, memory, thread coordination, leases, worktrees, and monitor health.

utilities.name: validate-thread-coordination.ps1
utilities.purpose: Validate thread registry, module teams, heartbeat state, and module overlap.

utilities.name: validate-worktree-leases.ps1
utilities.purpose: Detect exact and parent/child overlapping active write leases.

utilities.name: reconcile-worktrees.ps1
utilities.purpose: Compare Git worktrees with .codex worktree registry and observed external worktrees.

utilities.name: monitor-autonomous-org.ps1
utilities.purpose: Generate/check the team dashboard and idle-state monitor.

utilities.name: cleanup-autonomous-org.ps1
utilities.purpose: Pause stale threads, release stale leases, and write cleanup audit events.

utilities.name: register-thread.ps1
utilities.purpose: Register an overall or module-level Codex thread.

utilities.name: heartbeat-thread.ps1
utilities.purpose: Refresh a thread heartbeat and current next action.

utilities.name: close-thread.ps1
utilities.purpose: Close, pause, block, or archive a registered thread.

utilities.name: acquire-lease.ps1
utilities.purpose: Acquire a scoped write lease for a registered thread.

utilities.name: release-lease.ps1
utilities.purpose: Release, abandon, or expire a lease and append an audit event.

utilities.name: start-work-item.ps1
utilities.purpose: Move a work item into progress, acquire lease, create checkpoint, and write audit event.

utilities.name: complete-work-item.ps1
utilities.purpose: Move a work item to review/done/blocked and write validation/audit outcome.

utilities.name: select-next-work.ps1
utilities.purpose: Select the highest-score unblocked READY work item.

utilities.name: promote-backlog-item.ps1
utilities.purpose: Promote one scoped unblocked BACKLOG item to READY after refinement.

utilities.name: list-active-work.ps1
utilities.purpose: Print active agents, work, blockers, worktrees, leases, and next READY item.

utilities.name: list-module-teams.ps1
utilities.purpose: List supported overall and module-level teams.

utilities.name: get-module-prompt.ps1
utilities.purpose: Render the start prompt for an overall, multi-module coordinator, or module-level thread.

utilities.name: new-checkpoint.ps1
utilities.purpose: Create a real JSON checkpoint.

utilities.name: update-checkpoint.ps1
utilities.purpose: Update checkpoint status, next action, or blockers.

utilities.name: new-worktree.ps1
utilities.purpose: Register or create an isolated worktree.

utilities.name: close-worktree.ps1
utilities.purpose: Archive a worktree record.

utilities.name: select-validation-profile.ps1
utilities.purpose: Map changed paths to validation profiles.

utilities.name: write-audit-event.ps1
utilities.purpose: Append compact JSONL coordination events without storing secrets.
